message.content: Two side-by-side striped spherical Moon maps compare “Albedo” in grayscale with a mostly dark “Water Signature” sphere showing a small blue marking near the top.
message.reasoning_content: The user wants a one short sentence description of the image. Need answer only. Describe: side-by-side spherical lunar maps labeled Albedo and Water Signature, with striped grayscale bands and a small blue water-signature mark on the right sphere. Keep one sentence.
